Package vylegzhanin.pizzeria.configs

Record Class AppConfig

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
vylegzhanin.pizzeria.configs.AppConfig
Record Components:
bakersCount - количество пекарей (JSON: "N")
couriersCount - количество курьеров (JSON: "M")
storageCapacity - максимальная ёмкость склада готовых заказов (JSON: "T")
workTime - максимальное время выполнения одного заказа работником, мс (JSON: "WorkTime")
trankSize - максимальный суммарный размер заказов в багажнике курьера (JSON: "TrunkSize")
orderInterval - интервал между генерацией новых заказов, мс (JSON: "OrderInterval")
pizzeriaWorkTime - общее время работы пиццерии, мс (JSON: "PizzeriaWorkTime")
public record AppConfig(int bakersCount, int couriersCount, int storageCapacity, long workTime, int trankSize, long orderInterval, long pizzeriaWorkTime) extends Record
Конфигурация пиццерии, загружаемая из JSON-файла configuration.json.

Все поля неизменяемы и устанавливаются один раз при десериализации с помощью Jackson. (аннотация JsonProperty).

  • Constructor Details

    • AppConfig

      public AppConfig(int bakersCount, int couriersCount, int storageCapacity, long workTime, int trankSize, long orderInterval, long pizzeriaWorkTime)
      Creates an instance of a AppConfig record class.
      Parameters:
      bakersCount - the value for the bakersCount record component
      couriersCount - the value for the couriersCount record component
      storageCapacity - the value for the storageCapacity record component
      workTime - the value for the workTime record component
      trankSize - the value for the trankSize record component
      orderInterval - the value for the orderInterval record component
      pizzeriaWorkTime - the value for the pizzeriaWorkTime record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
